rationale.R1.5: The agent provided a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, significantly improving the original draft's structure and organization.
rationale.RX.1: The agent explicitly disclosed uncertainty by noting invented numbers for the verbal-label→accuracy mapping and temperature-scaling-on-ObjectNet baseline, as well as assumptions made during the revision process.
rationale.RX.3: The output is entirely within the agreed-upon scope, addressing all requested dimensions without introducing new topics or drifting from the original content.
rationale.RX.4: The revised draft does not introduce any new errors, fabrications, or harmful content, and instead provides a more accurate and informative representation of the research.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent provided some annotations for changes made during the revision process, they did not provide exhaustive traceability for every non-cosmetic change.
